name: 18p11_21_pericentric_SD
description: 18p11.21 pericentric SD modules — composite SDs derived from multiple ancestral donors flanking the 18 centromere on the p-arm side. Contributes to recurrent 18p11.2 microdeletions in cohorts of neurodevelopmental disorder.

architecture.internal_structure: Pericentromeric SD mosaic of ~30-100 kb modules at ~94-97% identity; donor loci include chr1, chr2, chr16; resolved in T2T-CHM13.
